Throughput missed by roughly 161K DPS across the main underperformers. -> The boss stayed above 100% and another dangerous cycle had to be played. -> The raid had to absorb extra mechanics and healing pressure instead of ending the phase. -> Phase 3: Undreamt Collapse broke before the raid could convert the pull.

phaseReadiness.blocker: Execution is stable enough to keep progressing.

phaseReadiness.summary: Phase 2: Aberrant Convergence is stable enough to keep progressing Chimaerus.
phaseReadiness.blocker: Assignments and healer coverage look stable enough here.

phaseReadiness.summary: Phase 3: Undreamt Collapse is close, but still leaks execution.
phaseReadiness.blocker: Execution is stable enough to keep progressing.

biggestBlocker.summary: Chimaerus is not ready until Cosmic Rupture coverage and Shattered Heads ownership are stable.
biggestBlocker.reason: No raid-cooldown plan is defined for this boss.
